headline: Linde's Q2 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Linde is projected to announce its second-quarter results next week, with analysts predicting a single-digit rise in the company's earnings.

headline: Linde Marks 11th Consecutive Year in FTSE4Good Index Series
summary: WOKING, England, July 22, 2026--Linde (Nasdaq: LIN) has been included in the FTSE4Good Index Series for the 11th consecutive year, recognizing its continued leadership in sustainable business practices.
